# Voice Log Pro — llms.txt (AI crawler index)
# Generated 2026-07-09. Total indexed pages: 134
# Format: Markdown with URL lists. Compatible with GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot.

## Product & Core Pages (6 pages)
Voice Log Pro is a voice-to-PDF daily construction report SaaS for subcontractors.
- [Homepage](https://voicelogpro.com/): Voice-to-PDF Construction Daily Reports — $49/month
- [Crew Plan](https://voicelogpro.com/crew-plan): Join the waitlist for voice-first daily reports
- [About](https://voicelogpro.com/about): Built by subcontractors who learned that missing reports cost more than bad work
- [Contact](https://voicelogpro.com/contact): Get in touch — support, partnerships, questions
- [Beta](https://voicelogpro.com/beta): Early beta access for construction crews
- [Blog](https://voicelogpro.com/blog): Construction law, lien rights, and daily documentation guides

## State Lien Law Guides (8 pages)
Mechanics lien deadlines, preliminary notice rules, and enforcement timelines per state. Total: 8 pages.
- [California Lien Law](https://voicelogpro.com/states/california-lien-law): 20-day preliminary notice, 90-day lien window
- [Texas Lien Law](https://voicelogpro.com/blog/texas-property-code-chapter-53-guide-2025): Chapter 53 monthly notices, 15th-day deadlines
- [Florida Lien Law](https://voicelogpro.com/states/florida-lien-law): Notice to Owner, 90-day lien window
- [New York Lien Law](https://voicelogpro.com/states/new-york-lien-law): 4-8 month filing window by project type
- [Illinois Lien Law](https://voicelogpro.com/states/illinois-lien-law): 60-day owner notice, 4-month lien
- [Ohio Lien Law](https://voicelogpro.com/states/ohio-lien-law): 75-day filing, 6-year enforcement
- [Georgia Lien Law](https://voicelogpro.com/states/georgia-lien-law): 90-day filing, 365-day enforcement
- [North Carolina Lien Law](https://voicelogpro.com/states/north-carolina-lien-law): 120-day filing, 180-day enforcement
- [Colorado Lien Law](https://voicelogpro.com/states/colorado-lien-law): 10-day intent notice, 4-month lien
